title: lawrencia berthae
intro: Lawrencia berthae, also known as the Warrigal green or kangaroo tea, is a native Australian plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Lawrencia berthae include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Lawrencia berthae include tea, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed or applied topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
intro_study: According to the "Journal of alternative and complementary medicine (New York, N.Y.)", Laurencia berthae benefits may include being safe for use when prescribed by a clinically trained botanical prescriber, as no patients in the study showed signs of organ damage during follow-up, with relatively small intakes or topical applications being safe.
